name: shared note opens for signed-out visitors

steps.name: API should create a note for the share-link scenario
API-created note card should be visible in the notes list getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Shared note 1784036743679-b339fe' }).first()
Reading view should be visible after opening the API-created note getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reading' })
Reading view should display the expected note body before sharing locator('.note-content')
Reading view should display tag "share-tag-1784036743679-b339fe-one" before sharing getByTestId('editor-container').getByText('share-tag-1784036743679-b339fe-one', { exact: true })
Reading view should display tag "share-tag-1784036743679-b339fe-two" before sharing getByTestId('editor-container').getByText('share-tag-1784036743679-b339fe-two', { exact: true })
Share note menu item should be visible after clicking more actions getByRole('menuitem', { name: 'Share note' })
create public share link
Click getByRole('menuitem', { name: 'Share note' })
